wins.event: Q4 Data Center revenue $2.3B record, +38% YoY and +43% sequential
2024 Data Center GPU revenue guidance raised from $2B to $3.5B+
MI300 launch with strong customer pull (Microsoft, Oracle, Meta, Dell, HPE)
Client segment revenue $1.5B, +62% YoY driven by Ryzen 7000
Server CPU revenue share gain driven by 4th-gen EPYC

risks.event: Gaming segment revenue -17% YoY; expected significant double-digit decline in 2024
Embedded segment -24% YoY; soft demand expected through H1 2024
Q1 2024 revenue guidance $5.4B implies sequential decline of 13%
2024 PC TAM expected to grow only modestly; weighted to H2 on AI PC ramp

guidance.notes: 2024 Data Center GPU revenue guidance raised from prior $2B+ to $3.5B+ on strong MI300 customer pull; 2024 gross margin expected to expand.

_notes: Strong AI/DC story with explicit guidance raise, offset by visible weakness in Gaming and Embedded segments. CEO confident, CFO balanced.
